name: Rainbow Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease three 13x9x2 inch pans and line with waxed paper.
3. In a large bowl, break up the almond paste. Add butter, sugar, egg yolks, and almond extract. Beat until well combined.
4. Gradually add flour and salt, mixing well.
5. In a small bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. With a wooden spoon, gently fold the beaten egg whites into the almond mixture.
7. Divide the batter into three separate bowls. Add red food coloring to one bowl, green to another, and yellow to the third. Stir each color well.
8. Pour the colored batter into the prepared pans.
9. Bake for 15 minutes or until set. Remove from pans and place on a wax paper-lined cutting board.
10. Spread apricot or raspberry jam on the green layer. Top with the pink layer.
11. Cover with waxed paper and weigh down with a book. Refrigerate for about an hour.
12. Melt chocolate chips over low heat, stirring to ensure smoothness.
13. Spread melted chocolate evenly over the top and sides of the cake.
14. Refrigerate until the chocolate is firm.
15. Turn the cake out and spread additional chocolate on top.
16. Refrigerate again until ready to serve.
17. Cut into small rectangles before serving.
Notes:
